introSection: Wild West Mine Train is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently owned and travelled by Dutch showman Regter.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride would originally be setup at Brean Leisure Park in 2001, but it never operated, and would later be taken down and shipped to Primrose Valley Holiday Park.

After operating with Axels Nojesfalt in Sweden, it appeared on Dutch showman Regter's website in January 2023.

fullText:
Wild West Mine Train is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently owned and travelled by Dutch showman Regter.

The ride would originally be setup at Brean Leisure Park in 2001, but it never operated, and would later be taken down and shipped to Primrose Valley Holiday Park.

After operating with Axels Nojesfalt in Sweden, it appeared on Dutch showman Regter's website in January 2023.
